Who I Am

Expert Graphic Designer

I'm Frais Wahab, a professional graphic designer based in Multan, Pakistan with a passion for transforming ideas into compelling visual experiences. I specialize in creating brands that resonate, designs that convert, and visuals that captivate.

From startups needing their first logo to established brands requiring a complete visual overhaul — I deliver premium quality designs with meticulous attention to detail and a deep understanding of visual communication principles.

Logo Design Brand Identity Social Media UI/UX Photoshop Illustrator Canva 3D Mockups AI Graphics Motion Banners Flyers Business Cards

How I Work

My Process

A streamlined, collaborative design process that ensures outstanding results every time.

💡1

Discovery

Understanding your brand, goals, target audience, and vision through in-depth consultation.

✏️2

Concept

Sketching ideas and developing initial concepts based on research and creative exploration.

🎨3

Design

Crafting polished, pixel-perfect designs with full color, typography, and visual details.

🚀4

Deliver

Final delivery in all required formats with revisions included and complete source files.

Core Expertise

My Specialties

Deep expertise across every dimension of graphic design and visual communication.

🔥

Brand Identity Systems

Complete brand systems including logos, color palettes, typography guidelines, and usage rules that ensure brand consistency.

✨

Creative Visual Content

Original, scroll-stopping visual content that communicates your message and engages your audience across all platforms.

📐

Print & Digital Design

Expert handling of both print-ready and web-optimized design files, ensuring your brand looks stunning everywhere.

🎯

Marketing Collateral

Complete marketing design packages: brochures, catalogs, presentations, and all materials that represent your business.

💎

Luxury & Premium Aesthetics

High-end design sensibility for luxury brands, premium products, and clients who demand the absolute best in visual presentation.

⚡

Fast Turnaround

Efficient workflows and professional project management delivering premium designs on time, every time without compromising quality.
